title: How a man of God leads when it costs him first
caption:
Real leadership costs you first.

Not in theory. Not in your best moments. Right now — the apology you're avoiding, the problem you're about to hand off, the meeting you're grinding through when nobody notices.

Christ didn't delegate the cross. He walked into the cost for the people he was responsible for. That's not poetry. It's the model.

The man worth following goes into the hard thing first. First into the apology. First into the wreckage. First into the unglamorous Tuesday that only his people will remember.

"Whoever wants to be first must be slave of all." — Mark 10:44.

Save this and send it to the man you're learning to follow — or the man you're learning to be.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #servantleadership #scripture #christianity #mensministry
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
